title: Playbook
description: Executable playbook for QA UAT Agent (Sprint N5-04). A playbook is a navigation contract + business actions for a single goal on a single screen. The new schema is typed: navigation_steps follow NavigationPlan/1.0 NavigationStep shape, and arrival_assertions follow AssertionSpec.

navigation_steps.description: Navigation steps to reach target_screen (typed NavigationStep — same shape as NavigationPlan/1.0).

action_steps.description: Business interaction steps performed after target_screen is reached. Free-form to accommodate the existing legacy field shapes.

arrival_assertions.description: Mandatory assertions after the navigation phase (roadmap §5.4 + AP-07).

parameterizable_fields.description: Fields the calling scenario can override via data_bindings.
